message:
test(fcp-conformance/host-budget): pin BudgetTracker per-zone accounting + Allow/Warn/Deny enforcement (br-55yv3)

fcp-host BudgetTracker is the per-zone usage budget enforcement that
backs invoke-budget admission decisions. 129 inline tests cover
internals but no cross-crate conformance pinned the contract that
the host gateway, admin reporting CLI, and connector preflight all
depend on.

Adds 9 tests against the public fcp_host::BudgetTracker API:

- within_budget_evaluates_to_allow
- exceeded_under_deny_mode_evaluates_to_deny_and_converts_to_error
  (BudgetExceeded payload carries metric/used/limit/window_seconds —
  the structured fields triagers grep for)
- exceeded_under_warn_mode_evaluates_to_warn_and_does_not_convert_to_error
  (Warn-only mode MUST NOT surface as a denial error via to_error)
- accumulating_usage_within_same_window_sums (60+60 over 100 cap
  overflows on the second call — pins that the MetricWindow is
  preserved across calls, not reset per-call)
- multiple_metrics_in_one_record_usage_track_independently (Tokens
  OK + Bytes Exceeded -> Deny, with to_error pointing at Bytes not
  Tokens)
- per_zone_isolation_one_zone_overrun_does_not_affect_another
- snapshot_remaining_decreases_as_usage_grows (admin-reporting
  monotonicity contract)
- allow_at_exact_limit_is_allowed_not_exceeded (cap is exclusive
  above; usage == limit is Ok)
- empty_metrics_evaluates_as_allow_and_does_not_drift_usage

All 9 pass locally in <0.01s via cargo test -p fcp-conformance --test
host_budget_tracker_conformance.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
